meta.title: BlattWerk e.V. – Cannabis Social Club Hildesheim
meta.description: Information portal of BlattWerk e.V. – Cannabis Social Club in Hildesheim. Strain database, knowledge base, and club information.

nav.mission_desc: Our mission, values and the board
nav.csc_desc: Help with starting your own club
nav.knowledge_desc: Articles on law, health and growing

home.hero_text: Community-based, responsible cannabis cultivation in Hildesheim. Information, education, and community.
home.info_banner: This website is for informational purposes only and does not constitute advertising for cannabis consumption.
home.section_about_text: BlattWerk e.V. is a registered association in Hildesheim dedicated to community-based, responsible, and legal cannabis cultivation. Our goal is education, prevention, and the sharing of well-founded knowledge.
home.section_strains_text: Explore our comprehensive database with detailed information on cannabis strains – genetics, terpene profiles, effects, and cultivation details.
home.section_knowledge_text: In-depth knowledge on cannabinoids, terpenes, cultivation, legal matters, and health – scientifically prepared and clearly explained.
home.section_join_text: Joining BlattWerk e.V. is done through the Hanf-App. There you can submit your membership application and manage all club matters.
home.pillar_1_text: Conscious, responsible use of cannabis – for members, families, and the community.
home.pillar_2_text: Open communication, clear rules, and traceable decisions in all club matters.
home.pillar_3_text: More than a club – a network of like-minded people in Hildesheim.
home.pillar_4_text: Science-based knowledge on cannabinoids, prevention, and legal matters.
home.strain_feat_1_text: Complete family trees, crossing history, and regions of origin for all 89 documented strains.
home.strain_feat_2_text: Detailed terpene data – myrcene, limonene, caryophyllene – with aroma character and flavor profile.
home.strain_feat_3_text: THC/CBD levels, effect spectrum, and effect profile for informed, conscious decisions.

about.title: About BlattWerk e.V.
about.club_text: BlattWerk e.V. was founded with the goal of creating a responsible and legal framework for communal cannabis cultivation in Hildesheim. As a registered association, we place special emphasis on education, youth protection, and addiction prevention.
about.mission_text: We stand for an informed, responsible approach to cannabis. Through well-founded knowledge sharing and a strong community, we aim to contribute to a fact-based public debate.
about.value_1_text: Responsible use of cannabis is our top priority.
about.value_2_text: We rely on evidence-based information rather than ideology.
about.value_3_text: Respectful interaction with one another forms the foundation of our club.
about.value_4_text: Open communication and transparent club structures.

membership.title: Membership
membership.subtitle: Become Part of BlattWerk e.V.
membership.hanfapp_note: The membership application and all member management is handled exclusively through the Hanf-App.

prevention.title: Addiction Prevention & Youth Protection
prevention.subtitle: Responsibility Matters to Us
prevention.age_notice: Cannabis may only be distributed to club members aged 21 and over.
